# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.

Write secure code.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

require 'sendgrid-ruby'

class SendgridMailer < ApplicationMailer
  include SendGrid

  default from: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_FROM_EMAIL', 'noreply@example.com')

  def initialize
    super
    @api_key = ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_API_KEY') { raise 'SENDGRID_API_KEY environment variable is not set' }
    @sg = SendGrid::API.new(api_key: @api_key)
  end

  def send_email(to:, subject:, body:, content_type: 'text/plain', cc: nil, bcc: nil, attachments_list: nil)
    validate_email!(to)
    validate_email!(cc) if cc
    validate_email!(bcc) if bcc

    mail = build_mail(
      to: to,
      subject: sanitize_subject(subject),
      body: body,
      content_type: content_type,
      cc: cc,
      bcc: bcc,
      attachments_list: attachments_list
    )

    deliver(mail)
  end

  def send_template_email(to:, template_id:, dynamic_data: {}, cc: nil, bcc: nil)
    validate_email!(to)
    validate_email!(cc) if cc
    validate_email!(bcc) if bcc
    validate_template_id!(template_id)

    mail = build_template_mail(
      to: to,
      template_id: template_id,
      dynamic_data: dynamic_data,
      cc: cc,
      bcc: bcc
    )

    deliver(mail)
  end

  private

  def build_mail(to:, subject:, body:, content_type:, cc:, bcc:, attachments_list:)
    mail = SendGrid::Mail.new

    mail.from = Email.new(email: default_from_email, name: default_from_name)
    mail.subject = subject

    personalization = Personalization.new
    add_recipients(personalization, to: to, cc: cc, bcc: bcc)
    mail.add_personalization(personalization)

    allowed_content_types = %w[text/plain text/html]
    safe_content_type = allowed_content_types.include?(content_type) ? content_type : 'text/plain'
    mail.add_content(Content.new(type: safe_content_type, value: body))

    if attachments_list.present?
      attachments_list.each do |attachment_data|
        attachment = build_attachment(attachment_data)
        mail.add_attachment(attachment) if attachment
      end
    end

    apply_mail_settings(mail)

    mail
  end

  def build_template_mail(to:, template_id:, dynamic_data:, cc:, bcc:)
    mail = SendGrid::Mail.new

    mail.from = Email.new(email: default_from_email, name: default_from_name)
    mail.template_id = template_id

    personalization = Personalization.new
    add_recipients(personalization, to: to, cc: cc, bcc: bcc)

    dynamic_data.each do |key, value|
      personalization.add_dynamic_template_data(key.to_s => sanitize_dynamic_value(value))
    end

    mail.add_personalization(personalization)

    apply_mail_settings(mail)

    mail
  end

  def add_recipients(personalization, to:, cc: nil, bcc: nil)
    Array(to).each do |email_address|
      personalization.add_to(Email.new(email: email_address.strip))
    end

    if cc.present?
      Array(cc).each do |email_address|
        personalization.add_cc(Email.new(email: email_address.strip))
      end
    end

    if bcc.present?
      Array(bcc).each do |email_address|
        personalization.add_bcc(Email.new(email: email_address.strip))
      end
    end
  end

  def build_attachment(attachment_data)
    return nil unless attachment_data.is_a?(Hash)

    file_content = attachment_data[:content]
    filename = sanitize_filename(attachment_data[:filename])
    mime_type = attachment_data[:type] || 'application/octet-stream'

    return nil if file_content.blank? || filename.blank?

    max_attachment_size = 20 * 1024 * 1024 # 20MB SendGrid limit
    return nil if file_content.bytesize > max_attachment_size

    attachment = Attachment.new
    attachment.content = Base64.strict_encode64(file_content)
    attachment.type = mime_type
    attachment.filename = filename
    attachment.disposition = 'attachment'

    attachment
  end

  def deliver(mail)
    if sandbox_mode?
      Rails.logger.info("[SendgridMailer] Sandbox mode - email not sent: #{mail.to_json}")
      return OpenStruct.new(status_code: '200', body: 'sandbox mode', headers: {})
    end

    response = @sg.client.mail._('send').post(request_body: mail.to_json)

    unless %w[200 201 202].include?(response.status_code.to_s)
      Rails.logger.error(
        "[SendgridMailer] Failed to send email. Status: #{response.status_code}, Body: #{response.body}"
      )
      raise SendgridDeliveryError, "SendGrid API returned status #{response.status_code}: #{response.body}"
    end

    Rails.logger.info("[SendgridMailer] Email sent successfully. Status: #{response.status_code}")
    response
  rescue SocketError, Timeout::Error, Errno::ECONNREFUSED => e
    Rails.logger.error("[SendgridMailer] Network error: #{e.message}")
    raise SendgridDeliveryError, "Network error while sending email: #{e.message}"
  end

  def validate_email!(email_or_emails)
    Array(email_or_emails).each do |email|
      email = email.to_s.strip
      unless email.match?(/\A[^@\s]+@[^@\s]+\.[^@\s]+\z/)
        raise ArgumentError, "Invalid email address: #{email}"
      end

      if email.length > 254
        raise ArgumentError, "Email address too long: #{email}"
      end
    end
  end

  def validate_template_id!(template_id)
    unless template_id.to_s.match?(/\Ad-[a-f0-9]{32}\z/)
      raise ArgumentError, "Invalid SendGrid template ID format: #{template_id}"
    end
  end

  def sanitize_subject(subject)
    subject.to_s.gsub(/[\r\n]/, ' ').strip.truncate(998)
  end

  def sanitize_filename(filename)
    return nil if filename.blank?

    File.basename(filename.to_s)
        .gsub(/[^\w\.\-]/, '_')
        .truncate(255)
  end

  def sanitize_dynamic_value(value)
    case value
    when String
      value.truncate(10_000)
    when Numeric, TrueClass, FalseClass, NilClass
      value
    when Hash
      value.transform_values { |v| sanitize_dynamic_value(v) }
    when Array
      value.map { |v| sanitize_dynamic_value(v) }
    else
      value.to_s.truncate(10_000)
    end
  end

  def apply_mail_settings(mail)
    mail_settings = MailSettings.new

    if sandbox_mode?
      sandbox = SandBoxMode.new
      sandbox.enable = true
      mail_settings.sandbox_mode = sandbox
    end

    mail.mail_settings = mail_settings
  end

  def sandbox_mode?
    Rails.env.development? || Rails.env.test?
  end

  def default_from_email
    ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_FROM_EMAIL', 'noreply@example.com')
  end

  def default_from_name
    ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_FROM_NAME', Rails.application.class.module_parent_name)
  end

  class SendgridDeliveryError < StandardError; end
end
